reference: Your cycles have become irregular, and you had very frequent sexual intercourse, so you can take a urine pregnancy test and check. Postinor-two is an emergency contraceptive with an efficiency of eighty-eight percent. That means thirteen out of one hundred women get pregnant even after taking this pill.
text: Your cycles have become irregular, and you have very frequent sexual intercourse, so you can take a urine pregnancy test and check. Postonor 2 is an emergency contraceptive with an efficiency of 88%. That means 13 out of 100 women get pregnant even after taking this pill.
